title: Missouri AG Sues CoinFlip Over Crypto ATM Fraud Allegations
summary: Missouri's Attorney General has filed a lawsuit against CoinFlip, alleging its crypto ATMs were used in fraud schemes and charged excessive fees. The lawsuit highlights the risks of unregulated crypto transactions for consumers.
body:
Missouri Attorney General Andrew Bailey has sued CoinFlip, a major cryptocurrency ATM operator, accusing the company of facilitating widespread consumer fraud and charging exorbitant fees. The lawsuit claims that CoinFlip's ATMs were used in various scams, including romance fraud and investment scams, causing significant financial harm to Missouri residents.

According to the lawsuit, CoinFlip's ATMs allowed fraudsters to easily convert stolen funds into cryptocurrencies, making it difficult for victims to recover their money. The Attorney General's office also alleges that CoinFlip charged fees as high as 20% for transactions, far exceeding industry standards. The lawsuit seeks to hold CoinFlip accountable for its role in these fraudulent activities and to protect consumers from future harm.

This lawsuit highlights the growing concerns around the use of cryptocurrency ATMs and the need for better regulation in the crypto industry. For everyday users, this means being extra cautious when using crypto ATMs and understanding the potential risks involved. It also underscores the importance of choosing reputable crypto service providers.

Moving forward, consumers should watch for any regulatory updates or changes in the crypto ATM industry. If you have used CoinFlip's ATMs and believe you have been a victim of fraud, consider reporting it to the appropriate authorities and seeking legal advice. Read more → https://www.theblock.co/post/402153/missouri-ag-sues-coinflip?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
twitterThread: Missouri AG sues CoinFlip, calling its crypto ATMs 'getaway cars for fraud.' Fees as high as 20% were allegedly charged on transactions.
The lawsuit claims CoinFlip's ATMs were used in romance scams, investment fraud, and other schemes, making it hard for victims to recover funds.

If you've used CoinFlip's ATMs and suspect fraud, report it. Watch for regulatory updates in the crypto ATM industry. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-21-missouri-ag-sues-coinflip-over-crypto-atm-fraud-allegations
